{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Show the distribution of overall course evaluation ratings (1-5)"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Show the distribution of overall course evaluation ratings (1-5)"},"startedAt":1771855858517,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The user wants to see the distribution of overall course evaluation ratings on a 1-5 scale. The course_evaluations table has an overall_rating column (integer). I'll group by overall_rating and count the number of evaluations for each rating level, ordered by rating to show the distribution clearly.","sql":"
SELECT 
  overall_rating,
  COUNT(*) AS count,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS percentage
FROM course_evaluations
GROUP BY overall_rating
ORDER BY overall_rating ASC

visualization.title: Distribution of Overall Course Evaluation Ratings

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  overall_rating,
  COUNT(*) AS count,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS percentage
FROM course_evaluations
GROUP BY overall_rating
ORDER BY overall_rating ASC

visualization.title: Distribution of Overall Course Evaluation Ratings

result.sql:
SELECT 
  overall_rating,
  COUNT(*) AS count,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS percentage
FROM course_evaluations
GROUP BY overall_rating
ORDER BY overall_rating ASC
